title: eremorchis allantoidea
intro: Eremorchis allantoidea, also known as the Indian orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, among others. Eremorchis allantoidea is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations like capsules and tinctures.
